title: Blend 001199 and 001198 equal average
summary: Average the best CatBoost-corrected parent with sibling 001198 using equal probability weights.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199 behavior. Produce predictions for the 001199 and 001198 concepts, or load matching saved OOF/test predictions if the code already has a safe local mechanism. Set final predictions to 0.50 * pred_001199 + 0.50 * pred_001198. Keep the existing validation folds and output artifacts.
expected_effect: Stabilize two public-positive CatBoost-corrected variants and possibly improve leaderboard robustness.
risk: The two predictions may be too correlated, making the equal average neutral or slightly worse.
